response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct song performances: 'Welcome to Japari Park' (00:00-00:20) and 'Night of Fire' (00:21-05:00).
2. Resolved song metadata using on-screen text: 'Welcome to Japari Park' (Artist: Masayoshi Oishi) and 'Night of Fire' (Artist: A. Leonardi/Niko).
3. Performed web searches to retrieve full lyrics for both songs using the specified original artists and search rules (no quotes, no translations).
4. Constructed the JSON response with chronological scenes and full lyrics for each song.
response.global_summary: A concert performance video featuring a group of VTubers performing 'Welcome to Japari Park' and 'Night of Fire'.

scenes.description: The video starts with a dance performance of 'Welcome to Japari Park' by a group of performers in a sunny field setting. On-screen text includes 'ようこそジャパリパークへ'.
scenes.song_title: ようこそジャパリパークへ
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Welcome to ようこそジャパリパーク!
今日もドッタンバッタン大騒ぎ
高らかに笑い笑えば フレンズ
喧嘩して すっちゃかめっちゃかしても仲良し
けものは居ても のけものは居ない
本当の愛はここにある
ほら 君も手をつないで大冒険
Welcome to ようこそジャパリパーク!
今日もドッタンバッタン大騒ぎ
姿かたちも十人十色 だから魅かれ合うの
夕暮れ空に 指をそっと重ねたら
君をもっと知りたいな
振り向けば あちらこちらでトラブル
けものですもの 大目に見ててね
みんな自由に生きている
そう 君も飾らなくて大丈夫
Nice to meet you ジャパリパーク!
今日からはどうぞよろしくね
いつもいつでも優しい笑顔
君を待っていたの
開かれた扉(ゲート)
夢をいっぱい語ったら
続いてくグレイトジャーニー
Oh 東へ吠えろ 西へ吠えろ
世界中に響け サファリメロディ

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome to Welcome to Japari Park!
Today is also a big ruckus with a crash and a bang
If you laugh out loud, you're a friend
Even if you fight and make a mess, you're friends
Even if there are animals, there are no outcasts
True love is here
Come on, take your hand and go on a big adventure
Welcome to Welcome to Japari Park!
Today is also a big ruckus with a crash and a bang
Figures and shapes are also ten people, ten colors
That's why they attract each other
If you gently layer your fingers in the sunset sky
I want to know you more
If you look back, trouble is everywhere
Because we are animals, please overlook it
Everyone is living freely
Yes, you don't have to be decorated, it's okay
Nice to meet you Japari Park!
Nice to meet you from today onwards
Always always gentle smile
I was waiting for you
Opened door (gate)
If you talk a lot about dreams
Continuing great journey
Oh, roar to the east, roar to the west
Let the safari melody resonate around the world
Welcome to Welcome to Japari Park!
Welcome to Welcome to Japari Park!
Today is also a big ruckus with a crash and a bang
Figures and shapes are also ten people, ten colors
That's why they attract each other
If you gently layer your fingers in the sunset sky
I want to know you more
La la la la, la la la la
Oh, Welcome to the Japari Park!
La la la la, la la la la la la
Gather friends

Oh, Welcome to the Japari Park!
La la la la, la la la la la la
Wonderful departure

scenes.description: The performers transition to a concert stage and perform 'Night of Fire'. Text on screen indicates 'Night of Fire' and '作詞・作曲: A.LEONARDI'.

Welcome to the broken low
Welcome to the famous disco live
Come on lady, come and go
Come on lady, get me once and right
Not a danger, not a blacky stranger
Rock it - rock it - knock to my door I'll open

Fly to me, get ready for the
Night of fire, you better, better stay
You better, better begin the prayer to play
Night of fire, come on come over me
Come on over the top, you've never been here

Come over the top
